_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
condition: Fracture Condyle - Humerus – Open reduction and internal fixation (ORIF)
procedure_name: Fracture Condyle - Humerus - ORIF - Lateral Condyle
min_doctor_qualification: Diploma in Orthopedics with 5 years' experience

preauth.label: Clinical notes with history, signs, symptoms, evaluation findings, indication for procedure, planned line of management and advice for admission
X-ray labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right) confirming the diagnosis

claim.label: Post-procedure X-ray labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right) -Showing implant
Invoice or barcode of Implant used (optional)

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes with history, signs, symptoms, evaluation findings, indication for procedure, planned line of management and advice for admission submitted?
X-ray labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right) - confirming the diagnosis submitted?
Clinical photograph of affected part submitted?
Clinical notes and imaging indicative of procedure?

cpd_claim.q: Are detailed indoor case papers (ICPs) submitted?
Post-procedure X-ray labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right) showing implant submitted?
Are the detailed procedure / operative notes submitted?
Is the Invoice/barcode of Implant used submitted?
Is there a detailed discharge summary submitted?

common_queries: Clinical notes missing key information (history, signs, symptoms, evaluation findings, indication for procedure, planned line of management, or advice for admission).
Pre-operative X-ray missing or incorrectly labelled with patient ID, date, or side (Left/Right), or does not confirm diagnosis.
Clinical photograph of affected part missing or not clearly showing the affected area.
Post-procedure X-ray missing or incorrectly labelled with patient ID, date, or side (Left/Right), or does not clearly show the implant.
Detailed Procedure / Operative Notes missing or incomplete regarding surgical steps and implant details.
Invoice or barcode of Implant used is missing (if applicable).
Detailed Discharge summary missing or incomplete.
Clinical notes and imaging are not indicative of the procedure.

clinical_key_pointers: Open reduction internal fixation of Humerus lateral condyle
surgical_options: Fixation can be achieved using pins, headless screws, lag screws, locking compression plates, or dynamic compression plates to allow for early range of motion.
